name: edge: open malformed files together (zero-byte, extensionless, invalid UTF-8)
comment: Opens three malformed-CONTENT files together as tabs in one launch: a zero-byte file, an extensionless plain-text file, and a file with invalid UTF-8 bytes. tryToBreakIt: medit must open all of them without crashing or hanging - the editor stays present and responsive. The extensionless file loads as plain text; the invalid-UTF-8 file loads via an encoding fallback; the zero-byte file loads empty. We assert the editor exists after the batch open (no crash) and that a marker typed afterward lands (app still interactive). Large-file open is a SEPARATE concern with its own plan (edge-open-large-file.json) - a very large file's synchronous load blocks the main thread, which is a tracked medit perf defect (see docs/autopilot-feedback.md, medit defect M1), not a malformed-content case. The permission-denied (chmod 000) case is also separate (edge-open-denied-file.json) because its open fails rather than loads. Documented primitives only. Requires the Debug build; stage fixtures first (generates the zero-byte, invalid, noext files).
